description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a multi-level, boxy design, featuring a mix of light tan brick and dark gray exterior wall panels. The front facade includes large, rectangular windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The outdoor area boasts a swimming pool, lounge chairs, a fire pit, and a covered patio with seating, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and entertainment. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with some sections extending outward to create shaded areas and architectural interest. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear zones for relaxation, recreation, and social gatherings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with tan brick and dark gray panels, featuring large windows, a pool, and outdoor living spaces. The design is open, multi-leveled, and emphasizes contemporary style and comfort.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance, large windows, a covered patio, pool, lounge area, and fire pit, highlighting the outdoor amenities and open facade.
description_view_1: The right-side view reveals the depth of the structure, the flat roof sections, and the arrangement of rooms, with less emphasis on windows and more on the building's massing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back facade with additional windows and a more private, enclosed appearance, as well as the continuation of the flat roof and brickwork.
description_view_3: The left-side view shows the side elevation, the pool area, and the transition between outdoor and indoor spaces, with visible patio furniture and landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
